description:
Add a secure client-facing portal where studios can share a gallery for selection before final delivery. Clients can favorite, approve, reject, and leave per-photo comments so operators know exactly what to finalize.

**Rationale:** Studios often lose time handling feedback over text or email. A structured approval flow reduces back-and-forth, prevents wrong exports, and improves client experience.
title: Client Proofing & Approval Portal
